question_fr: En CSS, quelle valeur ne peut PAS être utilisée avec la propriété 'position' ?
question_en: In CSS, which value CANNOT be used with the 'position' property?
choices_fr: A) static | B) center | C) absolute | D) relative
choices_en: A) static | B) center | C) absolute | D) relative
explanation_fr: 'center' n'est pas une valeur valide pour position.
explanation_en: 'center' is not a valid value for position.

question_fr: Que signifie CPU ?
question_en: What does CPU stand for?
choices_fr: A) Central Process Unit | B) Central Processing Unit | C) Computer Personal Unit | D) Central Processor Unit
choices_en: A) Central Process Unit | B) Central Processing Unit | C) Computer Personal Unit | D) Central Processor Unit
explanation_fr: CPU signifie Unité Centrale de Traitement.
explanation_en: CPU stands for Central Processing Unit.

question_fr: Quel langage de programmation a été développé par Sun Microsystems en 1995 ?
question_en: Which programming language was developed by Sun Microsystems in 1995?
choices_fr: A) Python | B) Java | C) Solaris OS | D) C++
choices_en: A) Python | B) Java | C) Solaris OS | D) C++
explanation_fr: Java a été créé par James Gosling chez Sun.
explanation_en: Java was created by James Gosling at Sun.

question_fr: Que signifie GHz ?
question_en: What does GHz stand for?
choices_fr: A) Gigahotz | B) Gigahertz | C) Gigahetz | D) Gigahatz
choices_en: A) Gigahotz | B) Gigahertz | C) Gigahetz | D) Gigahatz
explanation_fr: GHz = Gigahertz, mesure de fréquence.
explanation_en: GHz = Gigahertz, a measure of frequency.

question_fr: Que fait le bouton Impr. écran (Prt Sc) ?
question_en: What does the Prt Sc button do?
choices_fr: A) Rien | B) Capture l'écran | C) Sauvegarde un .png | D) Ferme les fenêtres
choices_en: A) Nothing | B) Captures the screen and copies to clipboard | C) Saves a .png file | D) Closes all windows
explanation_fr: Impr. écran copie l'écran dans le presse-papiers.
explanation_en: Print Screen copies the screen to the clipboard.

question_fr: Que signifie LTS dans le marché logiciel ?
question_en: What does LTS stand for in the software market?
choices_fr: A) Long Taco Service | B) Long Term Support | C) Ludicrous Transfer Speed | D) Ludicrous Turbo Speed
choices_en: A) Long Taco Service | B) Long Term Support | C) Ludicrous Transfer Speed | D) Ludicrous Turbo Speed
explanation_fr: LTS = Support à Long Terme pour les versions stables.
explanation_en: LTS = Long Term Support for stable versions.

question_fr: En informatique, que signifie CLI ?
question_en: In computing terms, what does CLI stand for?
choices_fr: A) Common Language Input | B) Command Line Interface | C) Control Line Interface | D) Common Language Interface
choices_en: A) Common Language Input | B) Command Line Interface | C) Control Line Interface | D) Common Language Interface
explanation_fr: CLI = Interface en Ligne de Commande.
explanation_en: CLI = Command Line Interface.

question_fr: Quand le langage C# a-t-il été publié ?
question_en: When was the programming language 'C#' released?
explanation_fr: C# a été développé par Microsoft et sorti en 2000.
explanation_en: C# was developed by Microsoft and released in 2000.

question_fr: Que signifie RAID ?
question_en: What does RAID stand for?
choices_fr: A) Rapid Access for Indexed Devices | B) Redundant Array of Independent Disks | C) Range of Applications | D) Randomized Abstract Identification
choices_en: A) Rapid Access for Indexed Devices | B) Redundant Array of Independent Disks | C) Range of Applications | D) Randomized Abstract Identification
explanation_fr: RAID combine plusieurs disques pour la redondance ou la performance.
explanation_en: RAID combines multiple disks for redundancy or performance.

question_fr: Quelle était la limite de caractères originale d'un Tweet ?
question_en: On Twitter, what was the original character limit for a Tweet?
explanation_fr: La limite originale de 140 caractères a été doublée en 2017.
explanation_en: The original 140 character limit was doubled in 2017.

question_fr: En hexadécimal, quelle couleur correspond au code '#00FF00' ?
question_en: In 'Hexadecimal', what color would be displayed from '#00FF00'?
choices_fr: A) Rouge | B) Vert | C) Bleu | D) Jaune
choices_en: A) Red | B) Green | C) Blue | D) Yellow
explanation_fr: #00FF00 représente le vert pur (0 rouge, 255 vert, 0 bleu).
explanation_en: #00FF00 represents pure green (0 red, 255 green, 0 blue).

question_fr: Quel composant permet la communication entre tous les autres périphériques ?
question_en: Which hardware device provides an interface for all other devices to communicate?
choices_fr: A) CPU | B) Carte mère | C) Disque dur | D) RAM
choices_en: A) Central Processing Unit | B) Motherboard | C) Hard Disk Drive | D) Random Access Memory
explanation_fr: La carte mère connecte tous les composants de l'ordinateur.
explanation_en: The motherboard connects all computer components.

question_fr: Quel langage de programmation partage son nom avec une île indonésienne ?
question_en: Which programming language shares its name with an island in Indonesia?
choices_fr: A) Python | B) Java | C) C | D) Jakarta
choices_en: A) Python | B) Java | C) C | D) Jakarta
explanation_fr: Java est une île indonésienne célèbre pour son café.
explanation_en: Java is an Indonesian island famous for its coffee.

question_fr: Combien de kilo-octets dans un giga-octet (décimal) ?
question_en: How many kilobytes in one gigabyte (in decimal)?
explanation_fr: En décimal: 1 Go = 1000 Mo = 1 000 000 Ko.
explanation_en: In decimal: 1 GB = 1000 MB = 1,000,000 KB.

question_fr: Combien de valeurs un seul octet peut-il représenter ?
question_en: How many values can a single byte represent?
explanation_fr: Un octet = 8 bits = 2^8 = 256 valeurs possibles.
explanation_en: A byte = 8 bits = 2^8 = 256 possible values.

question_fr: Avec quel langage associe-t-on le framework Django ?
question_en: Which computer language would you associate Django framework with?
choices_fr: A) C# | B) Python | C) C++ | D) Java
choices_en: A) C# | B) Python | C) C++ | D) Java
explanation_fr: Django est un framework web Python créé en 2005.
explanation_en: Django is a Python web framework created in 2005.

question_fr: En informatique, que signifie LAN ?
question_en: In computing, what does LAN stand for?
choices_fr: A) Long Antenna Node | B) Local Area Network | C) Light Access Node | D) Land Address Navigation
choices_en: A) Long Antenna Node | B) Local Area Network | C) Light Access Node | D) Land Address Navigation
explanation_fr: LAN = Réseau Local.
explanation_en: LAN = Local Area Network.

question_fr: Comment appelle-t-on des fonctions avec le même nom mais des implémentations différentes ?
question_en: In programming, what do you call functions with the same name but different implementations?
choices_fr: A) Surcharge | B) Redéfinition | C) Abstraction | D) Héritage
choices_en: A) Overloading | B) Overriding | C) Abstracting | D) Inheriting
explanation_fr: La surcharge (overloading) permet plusieurs signatures pour une même fonction.
explanation_en: Overloading allows multiple signatures for the same function.

question_fr: Whistler était le nom de code de quel système d'exploitation Microsoft ?
question_en: Whistler was the codename of which Microsoft Operating System?
choices_fr: A) Windows 2000 | B) Windows XP | C) Windows 7 | D) Windows 95
choices_en: A) Windows 2000 | B) Windows XP | C) Windows 7 | D) Windows 95
explanation_fr: Windows XP s'appelait Whistler pendant son développement.
explanation_en: Windows XP was called Whistler during development.

question_fr: Le temps Unix est le nombre de secondes écoulées depuis quand ?
question_en: Unix Time is the number of seconds elapsed since when?
choices_fr: A) 4 juillet 1976 | B) 1er janvier 1970 | C) Anniversaire du créateur | D) 4 juillet 1980
choices_en: A) July 4, 1976 | B) Midnight, January 1, 1970 | C) Creator's birthday | D) July 4, 1980
explanation_fr: L'époque Unix commence le 1er janvier 1970 à minuit UTC.
explanation_en: Unix epoch starts on January 1, 1970 at midnight UTC.
